trending_videos.title: PRESIDENT - DOOM LOOP
trending_videos.description:
C I T I Z E N S,

The debut full-length address:

B L O O D  O F  Y O U R  E M P I R E

is now available to pre-order via  https://www.presidentband.com

D O O M  L O O P, the latest transmission, is out now.

The campaign escalates.

trending_videos.title: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Skitarii | Class Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
The Skitarii class is coming to Warhammer 40,000: Darktide June 23.

Wishlist now on Steam:
► https://fatshark.games/08TKqZ

The Adeptus Mechanicus will not see the secrets of Hive Tertium fall into the hands of heretics, the Skitarii Alpha Primus are elite operatives devoted to serving the will of the Omnissiah. They will annihilate all who stand in their way.

Learn more about Darktide's new class
► https://fatshark.games/lfMTcr

Don't miss the massive savings during Warhammer Skulls (May 21-28) on all Fatshark Warhammer games, DLCs and digital upgrades. 
► https://fatshark.games/8ItMLU

Check out the new Arbites and Hive Scum class bundle on Steam.
► https://fatshark.games/SdXaV0

________________________________________________________________________________________

Learn more about Darktide on the official website:
► https://fatshark.games/HdwS01

Subscribe to the Darktide newsletter
► https://fatshark.games/rzGOql

Follow the Darktide socials
► https://fatshark.games/N8eiJB

trending_videos.title: Vegas Golden Knights at Colorado Avalanche
trending_videos.description: The Colorado Avalanche battle the Vegas Golden Knights in Game 1 of the Western Conference Final. Colorado eliminated the Minnesota Wild and Vegas defeated the Anaheim Ducks to advance to the Western Conference Final at Ball Arena.

trending_videos.title: Masters of The Universe – Official Final Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Over 40 years ago… He saved his universe. He inspired a generation. Now, He-Man returns. Watch the final theatrical trailer for Masters Of The Universe - only in theaters June 5. Get tickets now.

About Amazon MGM Studios: Amazon MGM (Metro Goldwyn Mayer) is a leading entertainment company focused on the production and global distribution of film and television content across all platforms. The company owns one of the world’s deepest libraries of premium film and television content as well as the premium pay television network MGM+, which is available throughout the U.S. via cable, satellite, telco and digital distributors.  In addition, Amazon MGM has investments in numerous other television channels, digital platforms and interactive ventures and is producing premium short-form content for distribution. 

Connect with MGM Studios Online
Visit the MGM Studios WEBSITE: http://amazonmgmstudios.com/
Check out Amazon MGM on TIKTOK: https://www.tiktok.com/@amazonmgmstudios
Follow Amazon MG

trending_videos.title: America's Newsroom
trending_videos.description: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

trending_videos.title: Lucky Strike | Official Trailer | In Theaters June 26
trending_videos.description:
Inspired by true events, Lucky Strike tells the story of one soldier trapped behind enemy lines during the last major German offensive during WWII, what will become known as The Battle of the Bulge. Armed only with his Motorola SCR-300 radio, a new technology only battle-ready near the end of the war, he must use his wits and spy craft to thwart the advancing Nazi Panzer army and find his way back home. 

The film reunites director Rod Lurie, producer Marc Frydman and star and producer Scott Eastwood following their acclaimed film The Outpost.

trending_videos.description:
kingdom of the caves

1000 Players Simulate UNDERGROUND Civilization in Minecraft

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨@FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere 
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc @JadenMAN @FlameFragsMC @saparata @ParrotX2 @TheobaldTheBird 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/user/andreaszoellermusic
https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks,

trending_videos.title: Pokémon TCG Pocket: Paradox Drive | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Discover Koraidon ex, Miraidon ex, and other Paradox Pokémon found in the depths of Area Zero in the new Pokémon TCG Pocket: Paradox Drive expansion, coming May 28!

Find all your favorite Pokémon merchandise at the official Pokémon Center: https://www.pokemoncenter.com/

Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/pokemon

trending_videos.title: TV Royale | EVO Princess, HERO Tombstone, NEW Game Mode, and MORE!
trending_videos.description:
Check the Patch Notes: https://supr.cl/Update_June26

Coming with the update:
🃏 Collection Levels
💎 Mastery Rework

Over the next season:
❄️ EVO Princess
💀 HERO Tombstone
👑 Princess Gambit
🏟️ Seasonal Arenas
🩷 Victory Run Event

X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Car

trending_videos.title: 007 First Light - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
trending_videos.description:
https://www.playstation.com/games/007-first-light

A James Bond re-imagined origin story begins on May 27, 2026.

Are you ready to go on this globetrotting adventure and #EarnTheNumber?

Pre-order now and get a free Deluxe Edition upgrade, including 24h early access.


#ps5 #ps5games #EarnTheNumber #007firstlight

gaming.description: Videos related to gaming are prominent in the trending list, particularly those associated with popular franchises like Warhammer 40,000 and Minecraft.
videos: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Skitarii | Class Reveal Trailer
1000 Players Simulate UNDERGROUND Civilization in Minecraft
gaming.insight: There is a strong audience interest in gaming, particularly in established franchises and innovative multiplayer scenarios.

entertainment.description: Trailers for movies and TV shows are trending, indicating significant interest in upcoming releases.
videos: Masters of The Universe – Official Final Trailer
Lucky Strike | Official Trailer | In Theaters June 26
007 First Light - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
entertainment.insight: Promotional content for new entertainment media is effective in capturing audience attention.

news_and_information.description: News content is also trending, showcasing the demand for current events and timely information.
news_and_information.insight: Timely and relevant news content remains a staple in audience engagement, especially from established networks.

sports.description: Sports content, particularly related to major leagues or events, is attracting viewers.
videos: Vegas Golden Knights at Colorado Avalanche
sports.insight: Live sports and highlights continue to draw significant audience interest.

unique_content.description: Unusual or niche topics, like the Skitarii class in a game or a unique game mode in a mobile game, are capturing niche audiences.
videos: TV Royale | EVO Princess, HERO Tombstone, NEW Game Mode, and MORE!
Pokémon TCG Pocket: Paradox Drive | Official Trailer
unique_content.insight: Unique and niche content can effectively capture specific audience segments, offering opportunities for differentiation.

top_channels.name: PRESIDENT
top_channels.insight: This channel has managed to trend with a single video, indicating strong content or existing audience engagement.

top_channels.name: Fatshark
top_channels.insight: Specialized gaming content from recognized developers can easily trend due to existing fan bases.

top_channels.name: ESPN
top_channels.insight: Major sports networks consistently trend, highlighting the ongoing demand for sports content.

top_channels.name: Amazon MGM Studios
top_channels.insight: Studios with well-known franchises can leverage their brand to maintain trending status.

top_channels.name: FOX News
top_channels.insight: Established news channels are able to capture trending slots with timely content.

gaming.opportunity: Develop content around popular franchises or innovative multiplayer modes to capture audience interest.

entertainment.opportunity: Produce promotional content for upcoming releases to engage audiences anticipating new entertainment media.

news.opportunity: Provide timely and relevant news coverage from credible sources to maintain audience engagement.

niche_content.opportunity: Explore unique angles or lesser-known topics within popular genres to attract niche audiences.

cross-promotion.opportunity: Collaborate with trending channels or creators within similar verticals to expand reach and audience base.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
